flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Lac Courte Oreilles Ojibwe University fell 33% between 2021 and 2024 (263 → 176).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Lac Courte Oreilles Ojibwe University rose 31% between 2021 and 2024 ($4.6k → $6.0k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Lac Courte Oreilles Ojibwe University rose 31% between 2021 and 2024 ($4.6k → $6.0k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Lac Courte Oreilles Ojibwe University rose 645% between 2021 and 2024 (3.0% → 22.6%).
